faqs.question: Where is AuraClinic located and what are your operational hours?
faqs.answer: AuraClinic is situated at Premium Avenue, Phase 5, DHA. We are operational Monday through Saturday from 11:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

faqs.question: Can I cancel or reschedule my appointment slot late?
faqs.answer: Yes, but we require a minimum of 24 hours advance notice for any adjustments or cancellation transformations to avoid a scheduling fee allocation.

faqs.question: What payment channels do you support?
faqs.answer: We accept all major Credit/Debit Cards, Bank Transfers, and Cash on Delivery for specialized medical skin care products packages.
